task: Compare the breeds Afghan Hound, Akita and Azawakh.
final_result_response:
Here is the full side-by-side comparison of **Afghan Hound**, **Akita**, and **Azawakh** from the AKC Compare Breeds tool at https://www.akc.org/compare-breeds/

---

## 🐾 AKC Breed Comparison: Afghan Hound vs. Akita vs. Azawakh

| Trait | Afghan Hound | Akita | Azawakh |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Group** | Hound | Working | Hound |
| **AKC Popularity Rank** | #110 | #62 | #192 |
| **Personality** | Independent, sweet | Dignified, courageous, profoundly loyal | Independent, loyal, deeply affectionate |
| **Size** | Large | XLarge | Large |
| **Height** | 25–27 in | 24–28 in (M), 24–26 in (F) | 25–29 in (M), 23.5–27.5 in (F) |
| **Weight** | 50–60 lbs | 100–130 lbs (M), 70–100 lbs (F) | 44–55 lbs (M), 33–44 lbs (F) |
| **Life Expectancy** | 12–18 years | 10–14 years | 12–15 years |
| **With Children** | Better with Supervision | Better with Supervision | Better with Supervision |
| **With Other Dogs** | With Supervision | Not Recommended | With Supervision |
| **Trainability** | May be stubborn | Agreeable | Independent |
| **Coat Length** | Long | Medium | Short |
| **Grooming Frequency** | Daily brushing | 2–3x per week | Weekly brushing |
| **Shedding** | Infrequent | Seasonal | Occasional |
| **Activity Level** | Energetic | Energetic | Regular Exercise |

---

### 🔑 Key Takeaways:
- **Akita** is the largest, heaviest, and most popular (#62) of the three. It is the most trainable but is **not recommended with other dogs**.
- **Afghan Hound** has the **longest potential lifespan** (up to 18 years) and demands the most grooming — daily brushing of its long, silky coat. It can be stubborn to train.
- **Azawakh** is the rarest (#192) and lightest breed, with the lowest grooming needs (short coat, weekly brushing). Though independent, it is deeply affectionate with its family.

All three breeds are independent in nature, require supervision around children, and are best suited for experienced dog owners.
